RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model

File name: carbon_cycling.py

Author(s): Jacob Johnson, jacob8399@gmail.com

Description: Carbon Cycle driver class.

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle.soil_carbon_aggregation(soil)
Description:

This function does the aggregation of carbon into pools “pseudocode_soil” S.6.C

Args:

soil

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle.update_all(soil, crop_type, weather, time)
Description:

This function calls all the necessary functions to update information related to the carbon cycle. The order in which each method is called is significant.

Args:

soil: an instance of the Soil class defined in soil.py crop_type: an instance of a BaseCrop representing the crop being grown in this field weather: an instance of the Weather class defined in classes.py time: an instance of the Time class defined in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomp_factors module

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomp_factors.moisture_factor(soil)
Description: calculates the moisture factor for carbon decomposition

“pseudocode_soil” S.6.A.2 defaults drawn from defac: course soil

Args:

soil

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomp_factors.temp_factor(soil, weather, time)
Description: calculates the Temperature factor for carbon decomposition

“pseudocode_soil” S.6.A.1 defaults drawn from defac: course soil

Args:

soil weather time

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomp_factors.update_all(soil, weather, time)
Description: calculates temperature and moisture decomposition factors for

Carbon based on weather and soil profile. “pseudocode_soil” S.6.A

Args:

soil: an instance of the Soil class defined in soil.py weather: an instance of the Weather class defined in classes.py time: an instance of the Time class defined in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.pool_gas_partitioning module

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.pool_gas_partitioning.update_all(soil)
Description:

This function does the partitioning of carbon into pools or gas loss “pseudocode_soil” S.6.C

Args:

soil: an instance of the Soil class defined in soil.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.residue_partitioning module

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.residue_partitioning.residue_partitioning(soil, crop_type, weather, time)
Description:

Partitions residue from crop yield “pseudocode_soil” S.6.B

Args:

soil crop_type weather time

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.residue_partitioning.update_all(soil, crop_type, weather, time)
Description:

Partitions residue from crop yield “pseudocode_soil” S.6.B

Args:

soil: an instance of the Soil class defined in soil.py crop_type: the instance of BaseCrop stored in crop.current_crop weather: an instance of the Weather class defined in classes.py time: an instance of the Time class defined in time.py
